info.description: Multi-tenant rights, royalty, and catalog administration platform for music publishers, labels, and managers. Endpoints are grouped by domain (Auth, Catalog, Royalties, Creators, Songs, Contracts, Placements, ...). All non-public endpoints require a Bearer JWT obtained from POST /api/auth/login.
info.title: Cadence Catalog Intelligence API

schema.title: Response Get Active Links Api Account Links Active  Org Id  Get
Response Get Links For Organization Api Account Links Organization  Org Id  Get
Response Get Pending Links Api Account Links Pending  Org Id  Get

get.description: Returns every action item attached to a specific creator.
get.summary: List action items for a creator

post.description: Re-runs the gap-detection engine across the entire organization. Idempotent.
post.summary: Regenerate action items for an org

get.description: Returns the org's action item queue with optional status / priority / due-date filters.
get.summary: List action items in an org

post.description: Manually creates an action item (most are auto-generated by the gap engine).

put.description: Patches title, description, due date, priority, or assigned user.

post.description: Closes an action item and stamps the completion time + user.

schema.title: Response List All Organizations Api Admin Organizations Get
Response List All Users Api Admin Users Get

get.description: Returns the org's audit trail (provisioning, deletes, role changes, payments, etc.) with paging.
Aggregated counts of audit events per category for dashboard tiles.

put.description: Verifies the supplied current_password before rotating to new_password. Existing sessions are not invalidated by a password change.

post.description: Username login is case-insensitive. Returns a Bearer JWT plus the user payload. Use the token in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header on every other endpoint. Records a UserSession row so the token can be revoked mid-flight.

Create a new user account. The very first user in a fresh deployment is automatically promoted to admin. Returns a Bearer JWT and the new user record. Also opens a UserSession row so the token can be revoked server-side.

get.description: Generate comprehensive Excel report for a catalog

Search for songs by title or artist name.
Returns local catalog matches or mock external data if no match found.

schema.title: Response Get Songs Api Catalog Songs Get

get.description: Get summary for all catalogs

schema.title: Response Get Catalog Summary Api Catalog Summary Get

get.description: Generate and serve the official Cadence Schedule A upload template

post.description:
Upload and parse Schedule A template.
Supports PDF and Excel formats.

get.description: Streams the original uploaded contract document.
Returns every contract linked to the song, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Contracts For Song Api Contracts Song  Song Id  Get

post.description: Uploads a PDF/DOCX, persists the binary, and runs AI parsing to extract terms (parties, dates, splits, advances).
post.summary: Upload a contract document for a song

delete.description: Removes a contract record and its stored file.

get.description: Returns the creator roster for the org. Optional filters narrow by status, type, or text search.

schema.title: Response Get Organization Creators Api Creators Org  Org Id  Get

post.description: Creates a new creator (writer / artist / producer / etc.) under the organization.

delete.description: Permanently removes the creator record. Linked credits are detached.

get.description: Returns the full creator profile, including songs, credits, contacts, and aggregate stats.

put.description: Patch creator fields (name, bio, links, type, status, etc.).

get.description: Returns every contact assigned to the creator with their role and primary flag.

post.description: Links an existing creative-directory contact to the creator with a specific role (e.g. MANAGER, LAWYER).
post.summary: Attach a contact to a creator

delete.description: Detaches a contact-role link. Does not delete the underlying contact.
delete.summary: Remove a contact from a creator

get.description: Export Schedule A CSV for a creator's catalog

post.description: Runs the AI document parser to preview a Schedule A or contract. No data is written.
Executes the import based on the previously confirmed preview payload. Returns counts of created / updated / skipped rows.
Parses the CSV, runs the AI column mapper, and returns a row-by-row preview with confidence scores. No data is written.

parameters.description: Return all rows instead of just preview
parameters.name: all_rows

schema.description: Return all rows instead of just preview
schema.title: All Rows

post.description: Same as document preview but accepts raw pasted text.

get.description:
Legacy alias of /health kept for backward compatibility with
existing frontend probes.

post.description: Flips is_cadence_staff off and revokes every active session for the user, cutting any in-flight JWT immediately. Writes a STAFF_DEPROVISIONED audit row.
post.summary: Deprovision a Cadence staff user (master admin only)

get.description:
Report Alembic migration state and lock status.

Master-admin only (`is_super_admin`). Used by the internal
portal (Task #76) to answer "what revision are we on?" without
SSHing into the container.

post.description: Creates a user with is_cadence_staff=True (cross-org READ access only). Writes a STAFF_PROVISIONED audit row and emails a welcome message.
post.summary: Provision a Cadence staff user (master admin only)

get.description: Returns the current user's notifications, newest first, with optional unread-only filter.

schema.title: Response Get Notifications Api Notifications Get

get.description: Owner/Admin: returns the organization-wide defaults for each notification type.

schema.title: Response Get Org Notification Settings Api Notifications Org  Org Id  Settings Get

get.description: Returns the current user's per-channel (in-app / email) preferences for each notification type.

schema.title: Response Get Preferences Api Notifications Preferences Get

put.description: Bulk-updates the current user's per-type, per-channel notification preferences.

post.summary: Send Creator Action Items Email Legacy

put.description: Bulk-marks every unread notification for the current user as read.

get.description: Returns the count of unread notifications for the current user. Cheap; safe to poll for badge counts.

delete.description: Removes a single notification from the current user's inbox.

put.description: Flips a single notification's read flag for the current user.

post.description: Creates an organization owned by the current user. The caller is added as the OWNER member.

get.description: Returns the organization the authenticated user is currently scoped to. Cadence staff and master admin see organization 1 by default if they are not a member of any org.
Returns the role (OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER) of the current user inside their current organization.
get.summary: Get current user's role in their org

get.description: Fetch an organization the caller is a member of. Master admin and is_cadence_staff users have cross-org read.
Returns the access code other users can redeem to join this organization. Owner/admin only.
get.summary: Get the org's join access code

get.description: Returns every user attached to the organization with their role.

schema.title: Response Get Organization Members Api Organizations  Org Id  Members Get

post.description: Rotates the organization's join code, invalidating the previous one. Owner/admin only.

get.description: Returns the org's sync licensing pipeline (PITCHED → APPROVED → CONFIRMED → INVOICED → PAID).

post.description: Adds a new sync placement to the pipeline.

get.description: Aggregated, branded sync report for the organization. Supports CSV / PDF export downstream.
Returns full placement data including financials, project metadata, and linked song(s).

put.description: Patches placement fields (project, status, fees, dates).

post.description: Moves a placement to the next pipeline status with validation; emits notifications.

get.description: Returns the org's releases with filters for status, type, and creator.

post.description: Creates a new release shell. Tracks are added separately via /tracks.

delete.description: Removes the release and detaches its track links.

get.description: Returns the release with ordered tracks, artwork, distribution metadata, and readiness state.

put.description: Patches release fields (title, type, release date, label, etc.).

get.description: Computes the readiness checklist for distribution: metadata completeness, artwork, splits, ISRCs, etc.

post.description: Appends a song to the release as a new ReleaseTrack with a track / disc number.
post.summary: Add a track to a release

delete.description: Detaches a track from the release without deleting the underlying song.
delete.summary: Remove a track from a release

post.description: Runs the royalty engine: matches transactions to assets, applies rights splits and contract terms, and produces creator-level allocations.

get.description: Full earnings + payments + advances + fees rollup for a single creator across all statements.
Aggregate financial overview: gross revenue, net to creators, fees, advances, and outstanding balances.
Returns recorded payments out to creators with status and amounts.

post.description: Records a cash disbursement to a creator. Updates outstanding balances accordingly.

get.description: Returns every statement ingested for the organization with paging and status filters.

post.description:
Delete several statements in one transaction, running the same
exhaustive cleanup (advance restore, payment unwind, action item
removal, file removal, audit log) per statement that the
single-statement endpoint runs. Either all deletions commit or
none do.

Combined non-mutating preview for deleting many statements at
once. Returns the same shape as the single-statement preview but
with totals summed and per-advance restores aggregated, so the
bulk confirmation dialog can show real numbers.
Ingests a CSV / XLSX / PDF royalty statement, normalizes columns, and stages it for matching. Supports DSP, label, publisher, and PRO statement formats.

delete.description: Hard-deletes the statement and all linked transactions. Use the preview endpoint first.

get.description: Returns the statement header plus a paged view of its transactions.

Return a non-mutating summary of what `DELETE` would remove.

The frontend uses this to populate the confirmation dialog so the
user knows exactly what's about to disappear (transactions, lines,
advance balances that will be restored, payment links that will
be unwound, action items, file on disk).

schema.title: Response List Schedule A Imports Api Schedule A Imports  Org Id  Get

post.description:
Re-run the unified document parser against the saved original file.

Useful after model upgrades or parser fixes. Does NOT modify any songs —
callers are expected to feed the returned rows back through the normal
/api/csv/import flow if they want to import them.

get.description: Legacy CSV export - redirects to new CSV endpoint
Streams the creator's Schedule A as a CSV download.
Returns the structured Schedule A rows (titles, splits, contracts) for a creator.
get.summary: Get a creator's Schedule A data

get.description: Renders a branded PDF Schedule A for the creator.
Export simplified Schedule A PDF for external sharing

post.description: Stages a Schedule A PDF/DOCX, runs AI extraction, and returns a parsed preview for review.

schema.title: Response Get Settings Api Settings  Get

get.description: Public endpoint to check which APIs are configured

post.description: Deletes multiple songs in a single transaction. Only songs the caller's organization owns are removed.

schema.title: Response Get Checklist Items Api Songs Checklist Items Get

get.description: Returns the org's songs. Supports text search, release-status filter, type filter, and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Organization Songs Api Songs Org  Org Id  Get

post.description: Adds a new song to the catalog. Creator credits can be supplied at creation; missing creators are auto-created.

delete.description: Permanently removes the song. Linked credits, splits, and contract assets are cleaned up.

get.description: Returns the full song record, including credits, splits, contracts, releases, and health score.

patch.description: Patches song metadata (title, ISRC, ISWC, release_status, etc.). Edit history captures every field change.

post.description: Adds a creator credit (writer / producer / featured / etc.) with a publishing % and master % share.
post.summary: Add a credit to a song

delete.description: Removes a credit from the song. Splits totals are recomputed.

patch.description: Patches a credit's role, publishing %, master %, or notes.

post.description: Creates a duplicate entry that links back to the original via parent_song_id.

get.description: Returns the full audit trail of field-level changes on a song with user attribution and timestamps.

post.description: Flips release_status to RELEASED and stamps the release date.

get.description: Returns the most recent valuation calculated for the song.

schema.title: Response Get Song Valuation Api Songs  Song Id  Valuation Get

post.description: Runs the catalog valuation engine (industry multiples + Black Box Algorithm) for the song and persists the result.

get.description: Returns every valuation ever computed for the song, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Song Valuation History Api Songs  Song Id  Valuations Get
Response List Tenant Members Api Tenant Admin Members Get

get.description: Download catalog valuation report as Excel file
Get comprehensive catalog valuation summary for the organization
Get detailed valuation information for a specific song
Returns the org's compositions (Works) with optional text search.

post.description: Creates a new composition (Work). Defaults to PENDING approval.

delete.description: Removes the work and its associated track / credit links.

get.description: Returns the work, its tracks, credit splits, and approval status.

put.description: Patches work fields. Mutating an APPROVED work generates an audit row.

post.description: Owner/Admin marks a PENDING work APPROVED and clears the related action item.
Owner/Admin rejects a PENDING work with a reason; notifies the submitter.

get.description:
Unauthenticated health endpoint for uptime monitors and load
balancer probes. Reports real DB connectivity (executes SELECT 1).
